description: A LinkedClaim record per the DIF Labs LinkedClaims specification (https://identity.foundation/labs-linkedclaims/). Claims are immutable, signed assertions about any URI-addressable subject. Each claim has a persistent URI (claimUri) so other claims can reference it as their subject, enabling a cross-system web of trust. LinkedClaims flow on ATProto but are not exclusive to it — the claimUri may point to any system where the claim originated.

main.description: A verifiable claim about any URI-addressable subject.

claimUri.description: Persistent URI identity of this claim per the DIF Labs LinkedClaims spec. This is how other claims reference this one (by using this URI as their subject). May be an AT-URI if the claim originated on ATProto, or an HTTPS URL or other URI if it originated elsewhere. Must be a well-formed, persistent, dereferenceable URI.

subject.description: The entity this claim is about. Can be any URI: HTTPS URL, DID, AT-URI, IPFS CID, or another claim's claimUri (for claims-about-claims such as endorsements or disputes).

claimType.description: Category of claim. Open vocabulary — common values include skill, credential, impact, endorsement, dispute, rating, review, membership, supersedes, revocation.

object.description: Optional object of the claim (e.g., skill name, credential type, rating category).

effectiveDate.description: When the claim became/becomes true (may differ from createdAt).

respondAt.description: URI where endorsements, disputes, or other responses to this claim may be sent. Per the LinkedClaims spec, MAY behave like an ActivityPub inbox.

embeddedProof.description: For claims signed by external methods (MetaMask, aca-py, Digital Bazaar, etc.) before being published to ATProto. Preserves the original signer identity when the ATProto repo owner differs from the claim signer.

aspect.description: The specific aspect being rated or assessed (e.g., quality, reliability, timeliness).

claimSource.description: Structured provenance/evidence for a claim. Based on the cooperation.org/credentials/v1 ClaimSource vocabulary and the LinkedClaims SHOULD requirement for hashlinked evidence.

uri.description: URI of the evidence (HTTPS URL, IPFS CID, AT-URI, etc.).

digestMultibase.description: Multibase-encoded hash of the evidence content for integrity verification, per W3C VC Data Model 2.0 (e.g., zQm...).

howKnown.description: How the signer knows this claim to be true.

author.description: Original author of the evidence (if different from claim signer).

embeddedProof.description: Cryptographic proof from external signing methods. Allows claims signed via MetaMask, aca-py, Digital Bazaar, etc. to be published on ATProto while preserving the original signer identity.

type.description: Signature suite type (e.g., EthereumEip712Signature2021, Ed25519Signature2020, JsonWebSignature2020).

verificationMethod.description: DID or key identifier of the actual claim signer (e.g., did:pkh:eip155:1:0xABC..., did:key:z6Mk..., did:web:example.com).

proofValue.description: The signature value (format depends on type).

proofPurpose.description: Purpose of the proof (typically assertionMethod for claims).
